title: VIKI Interface
description: Phoenix LiveView holographic dashboard. Three.js WebGL cube with translucent MemoryVault media mosaic tiles.

title: MediaTextureManager
description: Animated GIF/video thumbnail compositing via THREE.js VideoTexture. 3-layer panel fragment shader.

title: Azure Speech Service
description: Bicep module + Key Vault secrets. Phoenix runtime config wired through entrypoint.sh.

title: Landscape Tile Layout
description: 16:9 landscape + 1:1 square toggle. HUD keyboard shortcut T. Dynamic aspect-ratio switching.

title: Video Loop Textures
description: THREE.VideoTexture for MemoryVault video tiles. Seamless MP4 loop playback in WebGL.

title: Tile Cache Endpoint
description: GET /api/viki-interface/tiles — server-side tile cache for cube face media assignments.

title: I,Robot Shader
description: Center-weighted face blend over media tiles. Decay falloff compositing. Toggle key F.

title: Phoenix TTS Controller
description: POST /api/viki-interface/speak → Azure TTS audio/mpeg. Real-time text-to-speech synthesis.

title: Speech Playback
description: WebAudio decode + face glow pulse during speech. 503 handled gracefully. Speak button UI.

title: Neural Avatar Controller
description: POST /api/viki-interface/avatar/synthesize. Azure avatar synthesis pipeline.

title: Avatar Overlay Panel
description: Holographic tinted video overlay. Live/idle HUD indicators. Escape to dismiss.

title: Passkey Auth (wax_)
description: WebAuthn credential storage via wax_ library. viki_webauthn_credentials Ecto schema.

title: Passkey Registration
description: GET+POST /api/passkey/register endpoints. Browser WebAuthn JS client. Challenge/response flow.

title: Passkey Authentication
description: GET+POST /api/passkey/authenticate. Assertion verification. Session establishment.

title: Passkey Settings Page
description: /settings/passkey LiveView. Manage registered passkeys. Register new device flow.

title: AuthToken OTP Bridge
description: viki_auth_tokens migration. One-time tokens for VikiAgent native app authentication.

title: Token Redeem Endpoint
description: GET /auth/redeem?token= returns 401 on invalid. Issues session cookie on valid token.

title: VikiAgent Deep Link
description: Info.plist vikiagent:// URL scheme. handleOpenURL deep link handler. NSWorkspace.open() bridge.

title: VikiAgent Authenticate
description: Authenticate menu action. Opens browser → passkey → deep link → /auth/redeem → WKWebView dashboard.

title: ResourceMode Throttle
description: fullSend/balanced/conservative/paused enum. Auto-renice formation pids. 5s CPU/RAM sampler.

title: Formation Throttle Menu
description: Manual override with 30-min auto-expiry. Persisted to ~/.config/viki/agent.json.

title: Formation Status Poller
description: 3s poll of /tmp/mv-logs/ log tails. Regex parse [X.Y%] done/total pattern. Live throughput delta.

title: VikiAgent ASCII Formation
description: Rich ASCII Formation + Resource menu section. Sparklines, progress bars, aggregate CPU/RAM gauge.

title: FormationLive LiveView
description: Phoenix LiveView /formation page. Server-side /tmp/mv-logs/ reader. 3s PubSub tick. ETA computation.

title: Formation Router + Sidebar
description: Router wiring for /formation. Sidebar Operations section with cpu-chip icon.

title: Hook File Backfill
description: 12,050 records from execution/message_analysis/pattern_generation/todos hooks. 170-day temporal coverage.

title: Session Report Backfill
description: 12,630 records from 15 session report files. 998 sessions across 891 unique session IDs.

title: FB Research Export Backfill
description: 929 records ingested from Facebook Research exports. Multi-platform source integration.

title: APM/CCEM Session Backfill
description: 527 records ingested from CCEM APM session data. Formation telemetry and agent metrics.

title: SQLite Phases 2-4 Backfill
description: 10,602 net new records across phases 2-4. Deduplication applied. Schema-validated upsert.

title: CC Transcript Backfill
description: 29,800+ records from 123 Claude Code transcript files. Largest wave — still processing during showcase.

title: Formation Architecture
description: fmt-20260329-viki-backfill-001: 14 agents, 3 waves, 4 squadrons (Alpha/Beta/Gamma/Delta). CCEM APM telemetry.

title: 331K Records Indexed
description: Total: 331,051 claude_code_conversations rows. 1,191 unique sessions. 5,487 claude-mem observations.

title: Medallion Architecture
description: Bronze/Silver/Gold ADLS Gen2 layers. Parquet + Zstd. 40+ Azure resources, ~$1,250/month.
